title: Miconia favosa
taxonomy: Miconia favosa is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae. It belongs to the genus Miconia, which is a large and diverse group of plants. The family Melastomataceae is a family of flowering plants commonly known as the melastome family. This family is part of the order Myrtales, which includes various families of flowering plants. Miconia favosa is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America.
uses: Miconia favosa has been traditionally used in medicine, particularly in its native South America, where it is valued for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties.
